findings.description: The code example omits the outer RuntimeException and the SingleValidationTester call stack lines present in the source. The source shows the full trace starting with `java.lang.RuntimeException: unexpected exception occurred. target entity=[...] property=[failedCount]` and the `SingleValidationTester.invokeValidation` / `SingleValidationTester.testSingleValidation` frames. Only the `Caused by: IllegalArgumentException` portion is included in the knowledge file.
